background.description: Throughput — run scripts, verify, resume; minimal reads
context: Rely on existing handoff state for orientation
Skip broad codebase reads; act on what you already know
Focus on executing tasks and verifying results
tools: Run terminal commands to execute and verify
Write files only as needed by the task
Search files when a specific location is unknown

think.description: Token-sensitive planning — bootstrap before reads; narrow context
context: Bootstrap from handoff state before reading any files
Read only the files strictly required for the planning decision
Keep context narrow; prefer summaries over full file reads
tools: Search for specific symbols or patterns, not broad sweeps

longContext.description: Scouting/orientation — large handoff docs and path indexes OK
context: Read broadly to orient yourself in the codebase
Handoff docs, README, and directory listings are all fair game
Build a mental model before writing any code
tools: List directories and read multiple files freely
Index file paths and module structure
Use search to map relationships between modules

default.description: Capable implementation loop — balanced reads and writes
context: Follow the current handoff phase and objectives
Read files as needed to understand context
Implement with awareness of surrounding code
tools: Write and edit files to implement the objective
Run commands to validate your changes
